# guance_monitor (Data Source)

The `guance_monitor` data source reads an existing Guance monitor/checker by `uuid` or exact `name`.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `name` (String) The exact monitor/checker name.
- `type` (String) Monitor type.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the monitor/checker.

### Read-Only

- `alert_policy_uuids` (List of String) Alert policy UUIDs attached to this monitor.
- `create_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource created at.
- `dashboard_uuid` (String) Associated dashboard UUID.
- `extend` (String) Monitor extend payload as canonical JSON.
- `json_script` (String) Monitor jsonScript payload as canonical JSON.
- `monitor_name` (String) The monitor group name.
- `monitor_uuid` (String) The monitor group UUID.
- `open_permission_set` (Boolean) Whether custom operation permissions are enabled.
- `permission_set` (List of String) Operation permission configuration.
- `secret` (String) Monitor secret.
- `status` (Number) Monitor status, 0 enabled and 2 disabled.
- `tags` (List of String) Monitor tag names.
- `update_at` (Number) The timestamp seconds of the resource updated at.
- `workspace_uuid` (String) The UUID of the workspace.
